room_prompt:
[SCENESMITH_SCHOOL_CONTRACT_V1 room_id=girls_toilet profile=school_reference_20260710]
Immutable effective prompt SHA-256: ac8d297cc9a2d605f41b4bcd7abd52aac29bfd0f195875840342ee1e6a7da86f

Use warm cream/beige/off-white walls, light wood furniture and flooring, soft daylight, warm ceiling light, organized school displays, realistic scale, greenery, and clear humanoid/robot circulation. Nothing may float, visibly interpenetrate, block a door, or eliminate a usable walking/turning path.

ROOM-SPECIFIC REQUIRED CONTENTS:
Create a clean compact girls school toilet beside the boys toilet with at least two toilet fixtures/stalls, at least two sinks and mirrors, stall partitions, soap dispenser, paper-towel dispenser or hand dryer, trash bin, sanitary disposal bin, tiled floor/walls, and unblocked access.

--- FLOOR-PLANNER CONTEXT (SECONDARY) ---
Compact girls school restroom beside the boys restroom and foyer.

clear_circulation.label: Door clearance, aisles, and humanoid/robot circulation are visibly usable.
clear_circulation.observation: A large open floor area is maintained and the door swing/opening area is not visibly blocked, leaving a usable path to stalls and sinks.

collision_free_support.label: Objects are supported, correctly scaled, and visibly free of collisions/floating.
collision_free_support.observation: Fixtures and partitions appear grounded and wall-mounted items appear attached; no obvious floating or severe interpenetration is visible.

daylight_and_warm_lighting.label: Natural daylight and warm interior lighting are visible.
daylight_and_warm_lighting.observation: No windows/daylight source and no clearly visible warm ceiling light fixtures are shown in the room views.

inventory:drying.label: Required inventory is visibly represented: paper towel/hand dryer.
inventory:drying.observation: A wall-mounted white device near the sink area is visible and plausibly functions as a hand dryer.

inventory:mirrors.label: Required inventory is visibly represented: mirrors.
inventory:mirrors.observation: Two mirror-shaped panels are mounted above the sink vanity.

inventory:partitions.label: Required inventory is visibly represented: stall partitions.
inventory:partitions.observation: Multiple stall partitions are visible separating the toilet areas.

inventory:sanitary.label: Required inventory is visibly represented: sanitary disposal bin.
inventory:sanitary.observation: A sanitary disposal bin is not clearly identifiable anywhere in the stalls or near the toilets/sinks.

inventory:sinks.label: Required inventory is visibly represented: sinks/basins.
inventory:sinks.observation: A double-basin sink vanity with two basins is visible.

inventory:soap.observation: No clearly identifiable soap dispenser is visible near the sinks or on the walls (any candidate objects are ambiguous).

inventory:toilets.label: Required inventory is visibly represented: toilet fixtures/stalls.
inventory:toilets.observation: Two toilet fixtures are visible in the stall area.

inventory:trash.label: Required inventory is visibly represented: trash bin.
inventory:trash.observation: A lidded trash bin is visible near the sink area.

reference_style.label: Warm, welcoming reference-school style is visibly matched.
reference_style.observation: While finishes are neutral, the room lacks visible greenery and daylight/warm-lit ambiance seen in the reference target.

room_specific_arrangement.label: The room-specific arrangement and identity are visibly realized.
room_specific_arrangement.observation: The layout reads as a compact girls restroom: stalls on one side and a sink/mirror zone on the other with open central space.

warm_materials.label: Cream/beige walls and light wood materials are visibly present.
warm_materials.observation: Beige tiling and light wood cabinetry under the sink vanity are visible, fitting the warm-neutral material direction.
